meta_title: For Founders: user onboarding to Solve no project ideas (Intermediate Case Study)
meta_description: Learn how to user onboarding and overcome no project ideas. A Intermediate-level Case Study using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Founders: User Onboarding to Solve No Project Ideas
content.seo_description: Learn how to leverage user onboarding to overcome the 'no project ideas' trap. A high-impact, intermediate guide using Antigravity and Claude Code.
content.answer_block: Stop chasing 'perfect' ideas. Instead, build a frictionless onboarding flow that solves a specific micro-pain for a niche audience. By focusing on the user's first 60 seconds of value, you validate market demand immediately, turning a blank slate into a profitable, iterative SaaS product without needing a massive initial vision.
content.intro:
The blank screen is the graveyard of ambition. You’ve spent weeks agonizing over the 'next big thing,' yet you remain paralyzed by the lack of a perfect, market-ready idea. The truth? Your pursuit of the perfect idea is a procrastination engine disguised as strategy. Innovation rarely arrives as a lightning bolt; it is forged in the crucible of user interaction.

Shift your focus from 'what to build' to 'how to onboard.' By designing a high-velocity, intent-driven onboarding experience, you force users to reveal their pain points before you've written a single line of core business logic. This isn't just about design; it's about building a validation machine that turns anonymous visitors into paying customers, giving you the data you need to pivot toward what actually prints money.

steps.title: Define the Value-First Onboarding Hook
steps.description: Before coding, identify the 'Aha!' moment. Create a prompt to generate a 3-step onboarding flow that prioritizes immediate user benefit over data collection.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a 3-step user onboarding flow schema for a SaaS MVP. The flow must prioritize showing the 'Aha!' moment within 30 seconds of landing. Focus on minimal input fields and high-value feedback.

steps.title: Implement Intent-Based Personalization
steps.description: Use the onboarding flow to ask one high-value question that segment users, allowing you to tailor the product experience dynamically.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a React component for a selection-based onboarding step. The component should capture user intent (e.g., 'What is your primary goal?') and update local state to customize the dashboard view.

steps.title: Build the Progressive Profiling Engine
steps.description: Avoid form fatigue by collecting user data only when necessary. Implement a logic that triggers prompts based on specific user actions.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a hook for progressive profiling in Next.js. It should track user engagement and trigger an onboarding modal only after the user interacts with the core feature for the first time.

steps.title: Integrate Real-Time Analytics Tracking
steps.description: You cannot optimize what you don't measure. Add event tracking to every step of your onboarding funnel to identify drop-off points.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create an analytics wrapper for onboarding steps that logs user progression to a backend API. Include error handling for network timeouts.
steps.claude_code_command: claude add-dependency analytics-sdk && claude update --file src/lib/analytics.ts

steps.title: Simulate User Friction Testing
steps.description: Use Claude Code to simulate user sessions and identify potential bottlenecks in your flow before deploying.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a test suite for the onboarding flow that simulates a user dropping off at step 2. Ensure the state management correctly handles partial data saves.

pro_tips: Never ask for an email until the user has experienced at least one 'win' within your app.
Use 'optimistic UI' updates during onboarding to make the app feel instantaneous, even if backend processing is slow.
A/B test your CTA button copy; changing 'Get Started' to 'Solve My Problem' often increases conversion by 20%+.
Keep your onboarding logic decoupled from your main app state to allow for rapid, daily iterations.
Use 'skeleton screens' during the onboarding hand-off to maintain perceived performance while your database initializes user records.
content.next_steps: Deploy your MVP to Vercel, run a small ad spend or cold outreach campaign to get your first 10 users, and monitor your onboarding drop-off rate daily.
content.conversion_block: Stop building in a vacuum. Your product is only as good as the users who actually use it. By mastering onboarding, you stop guessing and start scaling. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
